name: Is MoE Routing a Huffman Code? Discovering the Frequency-Diversity Law in Chain-of-Thought
summary: arXiv:2607.20427v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts architectures have revolutionized scaling, yet the underlying logic of their routing remains a black box. In this paper, we unco...
description: arXiv:2607.20427v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts architectures have revolutionized scaling, yet the underlying logic of their routing remains a black box. In this paper, we uncover a fundamental governing principle: MoE routing is not merely selection, but a manifestation of Huffman Coding. We introduce the Frequency-Diversity Law, revealing that state-of-the-art models, suc...
author: Ching-Chieh Tsao, Zhuoyi Lin, Wenya Wang
